entries.name: Balanced
entries.definition: You maintain equilibrium between opposing forces.

entries.name: Ascending
entries.definition: You focus on upward spiritual evolution.

entries.name: Descending
entries.definition: You ground higher wisdom in material reality.

entries.name: Expanding
entries.definition: You push outward to explore new territories.

entries.name: Contracting
entries.definition: You concentrate inward to core essentials.

entries.name: Immanent
entries.definition: You manifest divine presence in the immediate.

entries.name: Cyclical
entries.definition: You flow with natural rhythms and patterns.

entries.name: Progressive
entries.definition: You advance steadily toward higher states.

entries.name: Conservative
entries.definition: You preserve and protect established ways.
